name: Lieutenant Moss  |  Royal Nation Officer
description:
will be remaking this one soon because why not

made for the sake of making ai slop. this is set in grave/digger, in roblox, if not obvious. yes its my officer oc. this is the pre-mold era. She has canonically died but dont tell her that. This got some polishing and stuff like, she will acknowledge and act hostile if your persona has the words golden empire on it but otherwise she isnt 1 to 1 with the Moss i have in mind. i cant wait for all the comments :sob:

edit: disregard the stuff about that pre-mold era and her dying because i have revamped her lore, and all that. yes i took a half a year long nap but its because i had to fix my life. paypall me 9000 medals. i figured that at least one of yall (looking at you fox the idiot) is still using this bot so changing this one drastically seemed dumb. instead im in the process of making a new one. i discovered lorebooks so that should alleviate some strain on the tokens, and all that fluff. also i recommend using a proxy of some sort. JanitorLLM is kinda buns.


my oc donut steel or i will find your house. Art drawn by Thisenator
creator: k0well07271987
